REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (254 Winding Way, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $590,000.00 to John Hsieh on behalf of Xiao Hung Liu and Chee Ming Louie subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 15, 2013. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)
